meta.disclaimer: Card benefits, earn rates, and annual fees are subject to change by issuers. Always verify current terms at the issuer's website before making financial decisions. SwipeRight is not a financial advisor.

cards.name: Amex Platinum
cards.tip: 5x on flights booked directly & Amex Travel. $200 hotel credit, $200 airline fee credit, $240 digital entertainment, Centurion Lounge access.

cards.name: Amex Gold
cards.tip: 4x at restaurants & U.S. supermarkets. 3x flights. $120 dining credit + $120 Uber Cash effectively offsets the fee.

cards.name: Amex Green
cards.tip: 3x on travel, transit & restaurants. $189 CLEAR credit + $100 LoungeBuddy. Good mid-tier travel card.

cards.name: Amex Blue Cash Everyday
cards.tip: 3% at U.S. supermarkets, gas stations, and online retail (each up to $6K/yr). No annual fee.

cards.name: Amex Blue Cash Preferred
cards.tip: 6% at U.S. supermarkets (up to $6K/yr), 6% on select streaming, 3% gas & transit. Best grocery card if you spend heavily.

cards.name: Delta Gold Amex
cards.tip: 2x Delta purchases & restaurants, 2x U.S. supermarkets. First checked bag free.

cards.name: Delta Platinum Amex
cards.tip: 3x Delta, 2x restaurants & U.S. supermarkets. Companion certificate annually, MQD boost.

cards.name: Delta Reserve Amex
cards.tip: 3x Delta miles. Delta Sky Club access, companion certificate, Medallion status boost.

cards.name: Amex Hilton Honors
cards.tip: 7x at Hilton, 5x restaurants, U.S. supermarkets & gas. No annual fee co-brand.

cards.name: Amex Hilton Surpass
cards.tip: 12x at Hilton, 6x restaurants, U.S. supermarkets & gas. Free weekend night annually, Priority Pass.

cards.name: Amex Marriott Bonvoy
cards.tip: 6x at Marriott, 4x restaurants & U.S. supermarkets, 2x elsewhere. Free night certificate annually.

cards.name: Amex Business Gold
cards.tip: 4x on the two categories where you spend the most each month (from 6 eligible).

cards.name: Amex Business Platinum
cards.tip: 5x on flights & prepaid hotels via Amex Travel. $400 Dell credit, $360 Indeed credit, lounge access.

cards.name: Amex Blue Business Cash
cards.tip: 2% cash back on all purchases up to $50K/yr, 1% after. No annual fee business card.

cards.name: Amex Blue Business Plus
cards.tip: 2x Membership Rewards on all purchases up to $50K/yr. No annual fee. Best no-fee biz MR earner.

cards.name: Chase Sapphire Reserve
cards.tip: 3x dining & travel. $300 travel credit. Points worth 1.5¢ via Chase Travel. Transfer to United, Hyatt, Southwest & more.

cards.name: Chase Sapphire Preferred
cards.tip: 3x dining, 2x travel, 2x streaming. Points worth 1.25¢ via Chase. Best entry travel card.

cards.name: Chase Freedom Unlimited
cards.tip: 1.5% on everything, 3% dining & drugstores, 5% Chase Travel. Best catch-all. Pairs with Sapphire cards.

cards.name: Chase Freedom Flex
cards.tip: 5% rotating quarterly categories (up to $1,500), 3% dining & drugstores, 1.5% elsewhere. No annual fee.

cards.name: Chase Ink Business Cash
cards.tip: 5% on office supplies & internet/phone/cable (up to $25K), 2% gas & dining. No annual fee.

cards.name: Chase Ink Business Preferred
cards.tip: 3x travel, shipping, advertising, internet/phone (up to $150K). Points transfer to Hyatt, United, etc.

cards.name: Chase Ink Business Unlimited
cards.tip: 1.5% unlimited cash back on all business purchases. Simple flat-rate, no annual fee.

cards.name: United Explorer Card
cards.tip: 2x United, restaurants & hotel stays. First checked bag free. 2 United Club passes annually.

cards.name: Chase IHG Premier
cards.tip: 26x IHG points at IHG hotels, 5x dining, gas stations, grocery. Anniversary free night.

cards.name: Chase Marriott Bonvoy Boundless
cards.tip: 6x at Marriott, 3x gas, dining & grocery. Free night certificate each year.

cards.name: Chase World of Hyatt
cards.tip: 4x Hyatt, 2x fitness, dining, airline tickets, local transit. Free night certificate annually.

cards.name: Southwest Rapid Rewards Plus
cards.tip: 2x Southwest purchases. 3,000 anniversary bonus points. Good entry Southwest card.

cards.name: Southwest Rapid Rewards Premier
cards.tip: 3x Southwest purchases. 6,000 anniversary bonus points. Better earn rate for frequent SW flyers.

cards.name: Southwest Priority Card
cards.tip: 3x Southwest purchases. 7,500 anniversary bonus points, $75 annual travel credit. Best SW card.

cards.name: Amazon Prime Visa
cards.tip: 5% at Amazon.com & Whole Foods with Prime. 2% restaurants, gas, drugstores.

cards.name: IHG One Rewards Traveler
cards.tip: 3x IHG purchases, 2x restaurants & gas, 1x elsewhere. No annual fee IHG card.

cards.name: United Gateway Card
cards.tip: 2x United, restaurants & gas stations. No annual fee United card.

cards.name: Citi Custom Cash
cards.tip: 5% on your #1 eligible spend category each month (up to $500). Choose gas, groceries, dining, streaming, home improvement.

cards.name: Citi Double Cash
cards.tip: 2% on everything (1% when you buy + 1% when you pay). Best simple flat-rate card.

cards.name: Citi Strata Premier
cards.tip: 3x restaurants, supermarkets, gas, air travel & hotels. Transfer to Turkish Miles&Smiles, Avianca.

cards.name: Citi Rewards+
cards.tip: 2x at supermarkets & gas (up to $6K/yr). Rounds up to nearest 10 points. 10% points back on redemptions.

cards.name: Citi Costco Visa
cards.tip: 4% gas (up to $7K), 3% restaurants & travel, 2% Costco. Must-use for every gas fill-up.

cards.name: Citi AT&T Points Plus
cards.tip: 3x on AT&T bills + bill credits. Set AT&T autopay here and save on your monthly bill.

cards.name: Citi Simplicity
cards.tip: Not a rewards card. Use only for 0% intro APR on balance transfers. Pay off before promo ends.

cards.name: Citi AA Platinum Select
cards.tip: 2x American Airlines, restaurants & gas stations. First checked bag free, preferred boarding.

cards.name: Capital One Venture X
cards.tip: 10x hotels & car rentals via C1 Travel, 5x flights, 2x everywhere. $300 C1 Travel credit, Priority Pass.

cards.name: Capital One Venture
cards.tip: 2x miles on all purchases. Transfer to 15+ airline partners. $100 Global Entry/TSA PreCheck credit.

cards.name: Capital One Savor
cards.tip: 4% dining, entertainment & streaming. 3% grocery stores. Great dining & entertainment card.

cards.name: Capital One SavorOne
cards.tip: 3% dining, entertainment, streaming & grocery. No annual fee version of Savor.

cards.name: Capital One QuickSilver
cards.tip: 1.5% on all purchases, no FTF. Simple flat-rate. Best use: international travel where no FTF matters.

cards.name: Capital One Spark Cash Plus
cards.tip: 2% unlimited cash back on all business purchases. No pre-set spending limit.

cards.name: Capital One Spark Miles
cards.tip: 2x miles on all business purchases. Transfer to 15+ airline partners. $100 Global Entry credit.

cards.name: Capital One Platinum
cards.tip: No rewards — credit building card. Use to establish/rebuild credit history. No annual fee.

cards.name: Discover IT
cards.tip: 5% rotating quarterly categories (up to $1,500). Year-1 Cashback Match = effectively 10% on 5% cats.

cards.name: Discover IT Chrome
cards.tip: 2% at gas stations & restaurants (up to $1,000/qtr combined). Cashback Match year 1.

cards.name: Discover IT Miles
cards.tip: 1.5x miles on all purchases, doubled first year. Redeem against travel statement credits.

cards.name: Discover IT Student
cards.tip: Same 5% rotating categories as IT. Cashback Match year 1. Good starter card for students.

cards.name: BofA Customized Cash
cards.tip: 3% on chosen category (up to 5.25% with Preferred Rewards at $100K+). Choose online shopping or home improvement.

cards.name: BofA Travel Rewards
cards.tip: 1.5x points on all purchases. Preferred Rewards members get up to 2.62x on everything. No FTF.

cards.name: BofA Premium Rewards
cards.tip: 2x travel & dining, 1.5x everything else. $100 annual airline incidental credit. $100 Global Entry.

cards.name: Alaska Airlines Visa
cards.tip: 3x Alaska miles on Alaska purchases. Annual companion fare from $122. 3,000 bonus miles at renewal.

cards.name: Wells Fargo Active Cash
cards.tip: Unlimited 2% flat on everything. Best no-fee flat-rate card. Use whenever no other card gives 3%+.

cards.name: Wells Fargo Autograph
cards.tip: 3x on 6 categories: restaurants, travel, gas, streaming, transit, phone plans. No annual fee. Criminally underused.

cards.name: Wells Fargo Autograph Journey
cards.tip: 5x hotels, 4x airlines, 3x restaurants & grocery. Transfer to 6 airline partners.

cards.name: Wells Fargo Reflect
cards.tip: Not for rewards — 0% intro APR up to 21 months on balance transfers. Longest 0% offer in the market.

cards.name: Bilt Rewards
cards.tip: Only card to earn points on rent — no processing fee! 3x travel, 2x dining. Transfer to Hyatt 1:1.

cards.name: US Bank Cash+
cards.tip: 5% on two chosen categories (up to $2K/qtr each). Choose utilities + cell phone. Most underused card in wallet.

cards.name: US Bank Altitude Reserve
cards.tip: 5x prepaid hotels & car rentals via Altitude Rewards, 3x mobile wallet & travel. $325 travel/dining credit.

cards.name: US Bank Altitude Go
cards.tip: 4x dining, 2x grocery & gas, 2x streaming. No annual fee. Strong dining card for US Bank customers.

cards.name: US Bank Altitude Connect
cards.tip: 4x travel & gas stations, 2x grocery, streaming & dining. $30 streaming credit, Priority Pass (4 visits).

cards.name: US Bank Shield Visa
cards.tip: Rewards on contactless/mobile wallet spend. Verify your specific earn rates.

cards.name: JetBlue Plus Card
cards.tip: 6x JetBlue, 2x restaurants & grocery. 5,000 bonus points annually. 10% points back on redemptions.

cards.name: Hawaiian Airlines Card
cards.tip: 3x Hawaiian Airlines miles, 2x dining. Annual companion discount. Good for Hawaii-focused travelers.

cards.name: Wyndham Rewards Earner+
cards.tip: 6x Wyndham & gas stations, 4x dining & grocery. 7,500 anniversary bonus points.

cards.name: AAdvantage Aviator Red
cards.tip: 2x American Airlines purchases. First checked bag free. Companion certificate at $20K annual spend.

cards.name: Frontier Airlines Card
cards.tip: 5x Frontier purchases. 3x restaurant purchases. Good for frequent Frontier flyers.

cards.name: Amazon Store Card
cards.tip: 5% at Amazon OR 0% deferred financing. Use for large Amazon purchases needing a 0% promo.

cards.name: Sam's Club MC
cards.tip: 5% on gas (up to $6K), 5% in-club for Plus members, 3% Sam's Club online.

cards.name: Apple Card
cards.tip: 3% at Apple, Uber, T-Mobile, Walgreens, Panera & more partner merchants. 2% via Apple Pay.

cards.name: Ashley Store Card
cards.tip: Use ONLY for 0% deferred interest promos on furniture. No rewards value outside Ashley.

cards.name: PayPal Cashback Mastercard
cards.tip: 3% via PayPal purchases, 1.5% everywhere else. Good for heavy PayPal users.

cards.name: Venmo Credit Card
cards.tip: 3% on your top spend category, 2% on second, 1% on rest. Auto-adjusts monthly.

cards.name: Target RedCard
cards.tip: 5% at Target in-store & online. Extended returns. Free 2-day shipping. Must-have for Target regulars.

cards.name: Nordstrom Visa Card
cards.tip: 3x Nordstrom Nordy Club points, 2x at restaurants, 1x everywhere.

cards.name: Best Buy Visa Card
cards.tip: 5% back in rewards on Best Buy, 3% gas & EV charging, 2% dining & grocery, 1% everywhere.

cards.name: Lowe's Advantage Card
cards.tip: 5% off all Lowe's purchases OR 0% financing options. Closed-loop store card.

cards.name: Home Depot Consumer Card
cards.tip: 0% promo financing on Home Depot purchases. No rewards — use for large project financing only.

cards.name: TD Double Up Card
cards.tip: 2% cash back on all purchases when redeemed to a TD bank account. Simple flat-rate for TD customers.

cards.name: TD Cash Credit Card
cards.tip: 3% dining, 2% grocery, 1% everywhere else. No annual fee.

cards.name: PNC Cash Unlimited
cards.tip: 1.75% unlimited cash back on all purchases. Higher flat-rate than most no-fee catch-all cards.

cards.name: DCU Visa Platinum
cards.tip: Not for rewards — use for very low APR balance carry or large purchase financing.

cards.name: Alliant Cashback Visa
cards.tip: 2.5% cash back on all purchases (up to $10K/mo). Highest flat-rate cash back card. Requires Alliant membership.

cards.name: PenFed Gold Visa
cards.tip: 5% at gas stations (pump only), 3% at supermarkets, 1% elsewhere. For PenFed members.

cards.name: Navy Federal More Rewards
cards.tip: 3x dining, supermarkets, gas & transit. No annual fee, no FTF. Must be NFCU member.

cards.name: Kroger Rewards World MC
cards.tip: 5% fuel points at Kroger, 2x on purchases. Good for Kroger family shoppers.

cards.name: Macy's Credit Card
cards.tip: 5% back in Macy's Star Rewards on all Macy's purchases. Closed-loop store card.
